ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the customer registered */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of residence */,
  "mobile_number" TEXT /* Mobile number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer providing the feedback */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "overall_rating" INTEGER /* Overall rating given by the customer */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feedback category */,
  "is_followed_up" INTEGER /* Whether a follow-up action was taken */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date when follow-up action was taken */,
  "follow_up_notes" TEXT /* Notes related to follow-up actions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES feedback_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mobile_app_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* ID referencing feedback from customer_feedback table */,
  "ease_of_use" INTEGER /* Rating for ease of use of the mobile app */,
  "ease_of_access" INTEGER /* Rating for ease of access of the mobile app */,
  "navigation" INTEGER /* Rating for navigation of the mobile app */,
  "likelihood_to_recommend" INTEGER /* Likelihood to recommend the mobile app */,
  "additional_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments from the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "online_interface_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* ID referencing feedback from customer_feedback table */,
  "ease_of_use" INTEGER /* Rating for ease of use of the online interface */,
  "ease_of_access" INTEGER /* Rating for ease of access of the online interface */,
  "navigation" INTEGER /* Rating for navigation of the online interface */,
  "likelihood_to_recommend" INTEGER /* Likelihood to recommend the online interface */,
  "additional_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments from the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Mobile App, Online Interface) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the category encompasses */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submission_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission log entry */,
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* ID referencing feedback from customer_feedback table */,
  "submission_time" TEXT /* Time when the feedback was submitted */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID who processed the feedback */,
  "log_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submission_logs_feedback_id FOREIGN KEY ("feedback_id") REFERENCES customer_feedback ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submission_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, data analyst) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* ID referencing feedback from customer_feedback table */,
  "response_text" TEXT /* Text of the response to the feedback */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date when the response was provided */,
  "response_status" TEXT /* Status of the response (e.g., pending, resolved, in progress) */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_responses_feedback_id FOREIGN KEY ("feedback_id") REFERENCES customer_feedback ("feedback_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metrics entry */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feedback category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the feedback category */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating across submissions for this category */,
  "submission_count" INTEGER /* Total number of submissions for this category */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_metrics_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES feedback_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback_surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey entry */,
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* ID referencing feedback from customer_feedback table */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey question */,
  "answer_text" TEXT /* Answer to the survey question */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_surveys_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES survey_questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_surveys_feedback_id FOREIGN KEY ("feedback_id") REFERENCES customer_feedback ("feedback_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey question */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the survey question */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Time when the user logged in */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Time when the user logged out */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)
